---
name: Security or privacy concern
about: Raise a non-sensitive security or privacy question
title: "[Security/Privacy]: "
labels: security, privacy
assignees: ""
---

## Before Posting

Do not use this public template for exploit details, credentials, sensitive
documents, personal information, or other confidential material. LocalFiles does
not yet publish a private vulnerability-reporting channel. Read the
repository's `SECURITY.md` before continuing.

## Concern

Describe the non-sensitive security or privacy concern.

## Area

- [ ] Local document processing
- [ ] Unexpected network behavior or data transfer
- [ ] Analytics, telemetry, advertising, or tracking
- [ ] Browser storage, retention, or logging
- [ ] Dependency or build pipeline
- [ ] Documentation or privacy claim
- [ ] Other

## Expected Safer Behavior

What behavior or documentation would resolve the concern?

## Additional Context

Provide only information that is safe to publish permanently.
